sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a seven out of 10 pain in his right index finger for approximately five days. He took ibuprofen and has used ice and a splint. He also reports chronic constipation managed with miralax and a past appendectomy at age seven.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The right hand x-ray demonstrates no fractures and a sprain of the distal interphalangeal joint.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a sprain of the distal interphalangeal joint in the right index finger.
medical_concepts: sprain of the distal interphalangeal joint

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I am ordering a strong antiinflammatory medication called mobic and instructing you to return in two weeks for follow-up to assess healing. Dragon, please order the medications and procedures mentioned.

medical_concepts: sprain of the distal interphalangeal joint
